use_cases: Displaying success, error, warning, or informational messages to users
Form validation feedback with customizable appearance styles
Toast notifications in a grouped toaster container
Inline alerts for dashboard or settings interfaces
Notification system with dismissible close actions
ai_summary: A multi-purpose alert and notification component with CVA-based variant system supporting 7 color modes (primary, secondary, destructive, success, info, warning, mono), 4 appearance styles (solid, outline, light, stroke), and 3 sizes. Features slot-based architecture for alert icons and close buttons using lucide-react, with semantic CSS custom properties for theming. Can operate as standalone notifications or grouped within a toaster container for stacked notification management.
